task.dependencies:
DCs:
e1: clean(policy_id: $policy_id1, subscription_length: $subscription_length1, vehicle_age: $vehicle_age1, customer_age: $customer_age1, region_code: $region_code1, region_density: $region_density1, segment: $segment1, model: $model1, fuel_type: $fuel_type1, max_torque: $max_torque1, max_power: $max_power1, engine_type: $engine_type1, airbags: $airbags1, is_esc: $is_esc1, is_adjustable_steering: $is_adjustable_steering1, is_tpms: $is_tpms1, is_parking_sensors: $is_parking_sensors1, is_parking_camera: $is_parking_camera1, rear_brakes_type: $rear_brakes_type1, displacement: $displacement1, cylinder: $cylinder1, transmission_type: $transmission_type1, steering_type: $steering_type1, turning_radius: $turning_radius1, length: $length1, width: $width1, gross_weight: $gross_weight1, is_front_fog_lights: $is_front_fog_lights1, is_rear_window_wiper: $is_rear_window_wiper1, is_rear_window_washer: $is_rear_window_washer1, is_rear_window_defogger: $is_rear_window_defogger1, is_brake_assist: $is_brake_assist1, is_power_door_locks: $is_power_door_locks1, is_central_locking: $is_central_locking1, is_power_steering: $is_power_steering1, is_driver_seat_height_adjustable: $is_driver_seat_height_adjustable1, is_day_night_rear_view_mirror: $is_day_night_rear_view_mirror1, is_ecw: $is_ecw1, is_speed_alert: $is_speed_alert1, ncap_rating: $ncap_rating1, claim_status: $claim_status1), clean(policy_id: $policy_id2, subscription_length: $subscription_length2, vehicle_age: $vehicle_age2, customer_age: $customer_age2, region_code: $region_code2, region_density: $region_density2, segment: $segment2, model: $model2, fuel_type: $fuel_type2, max_torque: $max_torque2, max_power: $max_power2, engine_type: $engine_type2, airbags: $airbags2, is_esc: $is_esc2, gross_weight: $gross_weight2, is_front_fog_lights: $is_front_fog_lights2, is_rear_window_wiper: $is_rear_window_wiper2, is_rear_window_washer: $is_rear_window_washer2, is_rear_window_defogger: $is_rear_window_defogger2, is_brake_assist: $is_brake_assist2, is_power_door_locks: $is_power_door_locks2, is_central_locking: $is_central_locking2, is_power_steering: $is_power_steering2, $ncap_rating2, claim_status: $claim_status2), $model1 == $model2, $engine_type1 != $engine_type2 -> #fail.
e2: clean(policy_id: $policy_id1, subscription_length: $subscription_length1, vehicle_age: $vehicle_age1, customer_age: $customer_age1, region_code: $region_code1, region_density: $region_density1, e8: clean(policy_id: $policy_id1, subscription_length: $subscription_length1, vehicle_age: $vehicle_age1, customer_age: $customer_age1, region_code: $region_code1, region_density: $region_density1, $is_driver_seat_height_adjustable1, is_day_night_rear_view_mirror: $is_day_night_rear_view_mirror1, is_ecw: $is_ecw1, is_speed_alert: $is_speed_alert1, ncap_rating: $ncap_rating1, claim_status: $ncap_rating2, claim_status: $claim_status2), $engine_type1 == $engine_type2, $fuel_type1 != $fuel_type2 -> #fail.
